subject: Charged twice for my March subscription
body: Hi, I just checked my bank statement and I was billed $29.99 twice on March 3rd for my Pro plan. I only have one account. Can you refund the duplicate charge? This is really frustrating because it's the second time it's happened.

subject: Thanks for the quick fix!
body: Just wanted to say your support team sorted out my login issue in under ten minutes. Really impressed with how smooth it was. Keep it up!
